stimulus: In 2008, Korean American chef Roy Choi launched a food truck called Kogi in Los Angeles, serving Korean-Mexican fusion tacos to long lines of customers. ______blank in 2013, Choi opened his first sit-down restaurant, Pot, to bring his innovative cuisine to a wider audience.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. "Later" logically signals that the event in this sentence—Choi opening his first sit-down restaurant in 2013—occurs later in a chronological sequence than the previous event about Choi launching the Kogi food truck in 2008.

Choice A is incorrect because "for example" illogically signals that opening Pot exemplifies launching the Kogi truck; instead, it is a separate later event. Choice B is incorrect because "instead" illogically signals an alternative; the second event is sequential, not a replacement. Choice C is incorrect because "in other words" illogically signals a restatement of the previous information.
